race.comment: LATIBULATE (6) trialled up well in readiness for her debut which saw her attract good market support but she couldn't quite live up to it after getting shuffled back. Finished off well though and has since gone back to the trials in-between. Will appreciate the added trip and can get the job done this time. FULLHEADOFSTEAM (2) gave a bold sight when resuming at Morphettville Parks off a 538-day break but has been a touch flat in his next two. Backs up quickly and should appreciate the added trip. Big threat. UNOYASELF (8) showed improvement in his second outing when chasing gamely into the placings on the syntho. Drawn the carpark this time so will likely be saved for the final shot at them. SHAMASTAR (7) has struggled in his last two but has good early speed and could give plenty of cheek.
